title: calamintha officinalis
intro: Calamintha officinalis, also known as lesser calamint or lesser mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Calamintha officinalis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as a natural antacid and anti-nauseant. Herbal preparations of Calamintha officinalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
